title: QuantumScape Corporation (QS) Stock Overview and News
text: QuantumScape Corporation (NASDAQ: QS) is a solid-state battery manufacturer focused on developing and commercializing next-generation lithium-metal batteries for electric vehicles and emerging markets. As of May 16, 2026, the stock was trading at approximately $8.42. The company's recent strategic announcements have centered on three key areas: expanding partnerships with major automotive OEMs, developing new markets in AI data centers and defense sectors, and advancing its manufacturing capabilities through the Eagle Line pilot facility. Q1 2026 financial results showed narrowing losses with EPS of -$0.16 versus consensus estimates of -$0.18, beating expectations despite continued significant net losses. The company reported $11 million in customer billings in Q1 2026, with management reiterating expectations for increasing customer billings throughout 2026. Analyst consensus remains cautiously optimistic with a Hold rating from 5 analysts, reflecting balanced skepticism about near-term commercialization timelines while acknowledging the long-term potential of the solid-state battery market.
